headline: Microchip Increases Manufacturing Capacity of its Hydrogen Masers
summary: The company opened a new facility in Tuscaloosa, Ala., to increase production and reduce lead timesCHANDLER, Ariz., April 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- A hydrogen maser is an atomic clock that uses properties of hydrogen atoms to emit precise microwave frequencies for highly stable and precise timekeeping.
